item.title: 多尔西在人工智能利弊与失业问题上态度摇摆
item.description: 裁员之后，Block董事长不确定人工智能对员工究竟是利是弊【原文：After job cuts, the Block chairman wasn’t sure whether AI would help or hurt workers】

item.title: 代理型人工智能初创公司Lyzr以2.5亿美元估值完成融资
item.description: 企业人工智能代理基础设施建设初创公司Lyzr AI完成新一轮融资，本轮融资由埃森哲公司领投，公司估值翻五倍至2.5亿美元。【原文：Lyzr AI, a startup that builds infrastructure for enterprise AI agents, closed a funding round led by Accenture Plc that quintupled its valuation to $250 million.】

item.title: 智利风险溢价从七年低点跃升，因"现实冲击"
item.description: 智利当选总统何塞·安东尼奥·卡斯特尚未于3月11日就职，经济难题已接踵而至，令其胜选时市场欢欣鼓舞的氛围蒙上阴影。【原文：Economic problems are piling up for Chile’s President-elect José Antonio Kast even before he takes office on March 11, damping the market euphoria that had accompanied his victory.】

item.title: 意大利试图摆脱欧盟审查却面临伊朗问题阻碍，Scope称
item.description: Scope评级公司表示，意大利为摆脱欧盟财政审查所做的努力，正面临因中东危机持续而受挫的风险。【原文：Italy’s push to shake off fiscal scrutiny by the European Union is in danger of being jolted by an extended Middle East crisis, Scope Ratings said.】

item.title: 印度农民在德里发起新一轮抗议活动，反对美印贸易协定
item.description: 周一，数百名农民和产业工人聚集在印度首都，要求政府停止他们在贸易谈判中所谓的对美让步，并通过一项保障最低农产品价格的法律。【原文：Hundreds of farmers and industrial workers gathered in India’s capital on Monday, asking the government to stop what they called concessions to the US in trade talks and to pass a law guaranteeing minimum crop prices.】

item.title: 沙特阿拉伯启动减产计划，霍尔木兹海峡封锁导致储油设施满载
item.description: 据知情人士透露，随着关键的霍尔木兹海峡濒临封锁，储油罐开始填满，沙特阿拉伯已开始削减石油产量。【原文：Saudi Arabia has started reducing oil production as the near-blockage of the critical Strait of Hormuz starts filling up storage tanks, according to a person familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 匈牙利月度赤字达64亿美元 奥尔班政府支出激增
item.description: 在总理维克托·奥尔班为4月12日大选加大选举支出后，匈牙利创下第二高的月度赤字。【原文：Hungary posted the second-biggest monthly deficit after Prime Minister Viktor Orban ramped up election spending before the April 12 ballot.】

item.title: 大众市场保险商IA金融公司瞄准美国市场寻求交易与扩张
item.description: 加拿大保险及资产管理公司iA Financial Corp.的负责人正寻求一项数十亿美元的收购交易，此前该公司年初创下历史估值新高。【原文：The head of Canadian insurer and money manager iA Financial Corp. is hunting for a multibillion-dollar acquisition after the firm reached a record valuation at the beginning of the year.】

item.title: 英国央行面临伊朗战争引发的5%通胀风险
item.description: 英国央行面临通胀率可能回升至5%的前景，交易员正加码押注近期降息政策将出现逆转。【原文：The Bank of England faces the prospect of UK inflation rebounding to 5%, with traders ramping up bets on a reversal of recent cuts to interest rates.】

item.title: 南非债券暴跌，油价上涨加剧通胀担忧
item.description: 南非政府债券延续了自新冠疫情以来最严重的抛售潮，因市场担忧油价飙升和兰特贬值将推高通胀，迫使央行重启加息。【原文：South African government bonds extended their worst selloff since the Covid pandemic as concern mounted that soaring oil prices and a weaker rand will fuel inflation, forcing the central bank to resume interest-rate increases.】

item.title: 油价逼近120美元引发股市债市"抛售潮"
item.description:
原油回吐涨幅，股市从低点回升，因市场预期各国政府将释放石油储备。

【原文：

Crude pares gain and stocks recover from lows on prospect that governments will release oil reserves.

】

item.title: 印度电商公司Meesho股价暴跌，因面临1.63亿美元税务追缴
item.description: 软银集团支持的印度电商平台Meesho Ltd.股价暴跌至每日跌停，此前该公司表示收到1.63亿美元的所得税追缴通知。【原文：Shares of SoftBank Group Corp.-backed Indian e-retailer Meesho Ltd. dropped by the daily limit after the platform said it received a $163 million income tax demand.】

item.title: 印尼镍矿厂因致命山体滑坡停产
item.description: 印尼四家中国经营的镍矿厂已暂时停产，此前上月其中一家工厂的废料堆场发生致命山体滑坡。这表明企业正被迫应对官方对该行业加强监管的压力。【原文：Four Chinese-run nickel plants in Indonesia have shut down temporarily after a deadly landslide last month at a waste area used by one of the facilities, a sign that companies are being forced to respond to greater official scrutiny of the sector.】

item.title: 巴基斯坦维持利率在10.5%不变，油价飙升令前景蒙上阴影
item.description: 巴基斯坦央行维持关键政策利率不变，理由是经济存在不确定性。此前油价因霍尔木兹海峡持续关闭而飙升，美国更威胁要加剧这场已颠覆能源市场的冲突。【原文：Pakistan’s central bank held its key policy rate citing economic uncertainty after oil prices surged as the Strait of Hormuz remained largely closed and the US threatened to deepen a conflict that has upended energy markets.】

item.title: 亚洲竞相应对能源危机，油价因战争突破每桶100美元大关
item.description: 亚洲能源进口国正竭力控制中东战争扩大带来的冲击。这场战争已颠覆石油和天然气市场，如今正冲击着从农民到汽车制造商乃至火葬场经营者等普通买家。【原文：Asia’s energy-importing economies are scrambling to contain the impact of a widening Middle East war that has upended oil and gas markets and is now battering ordinary buyers, from farmers to car manufacturers and crematorium operators.】

item.title: 动量交易中的"全面恐慌性抛售"预示着市场已触底
item.description: 这曾是华尔街最热门的交易之一，但三重危机接踵而至，导致高涨的动量股遭遇数年来的最剧烈回调。在部分股票专家看来，这场洗盘行情似乎已逼近临界点。【原文：It was one of Wall Street’s hottest trades, but a trifecta of troubles has ushered in one of the steepest drawdowns for high-flying momentum stocks in years. To some equity pros, the washout looks like it’s close to a breaking point.】

item.title: 中国服装制造商为油价飙升做好涨价准备
item.description: 中国服装供应商正为服装价格上涨做准备，因伊朗战争引发的原油价格飙升推高了整个供应链的原材料成本。【原文：Chinese clothing suppliers are bracing for higher apparel prices as the Iran war-induced surge in crude oil prices pushes up raw-material costs across the supply chain.】

item.title: 卡塔尔在伊朗无人机袭击后，据称将液化天然气扩建计划推迟至2027年
item.description: 卡塔尔能源公司宣布，由于上周无人机袭击导致拉斯拉凡工厂被迫关闭——这是该工厂有史以来的首次关闭事件——该公司一项重大液化天然气扩建项目的启动时间将推迟至2027年。【原文：QatarEnergy is pushing back the start of a major liquefied natural gas expansion project to at least 2027 after a drone attack last week that forced the unprecedented closure of its Ras Laffan plant.】

item.title: 投资者对欧元区经济的信心因伊朗战争骤然暴跌
item.description: 由于伊朗战争的影响，投资者对欧元区经济的信心急剧下滑，使原本好转的经济前景蒙上阴影。【原文：Investor confidence in the euro-area economy slumped due to the Iran war, clouding what had been an improving outlook.】

item.title: 加布勒公司股价上涨，欧洲防务企业IPO热潮持续
item.description: 潜艇部件供应商加布勒集团股份公司在德国上市首日股价最高上涨13.6%，得益于投资者对欧洲防务企业强劲的需求。【原文：Submarine components supplier Gabler Group AG’s shares rose as much as 13.6% on their first day of trading in Germany, buoyed by strong demand among investors for European defense firms.】

item.title: 菲律宾企业为成本上涨做准备，油价飙升拖累比索汇率
item.description: 菲律宾企业正为成本上升做准备，因油价飙升至每桶100美元以上拖累比索跌至历史新低，加剧了这个高度依赖中东燃料进口的经济体的风险。【原文：Philippine companies are bracing for higher costs as oil’s spike above $100 a barrel drags the peso to a record low, heightening the risks for an economy heavily reliant on fuel imports from the Middle East.】

item.title: 欧元看跌期权创2022年以来最大跌幅，因担忧战争持久化
item.description: 随着中东战争持续发酵，能源价格飙升并威胁欧洲经济，交易员对欧元的悲观情绪已升至俄罗斯四年前入侵乌克兰以来的最高点。【原文：Traders have turned the most pessimistic on the euro since Russia invaded Ukraine four years ago as the war in the Middle East drags on, sending energy prices soaring and threatening Europe’s economy.】

item.title: 苏黎世保险据称以约3.37亿欧元收购通用保险爱尔兰子公司
item.description: 知情人士透露，苏黎世保险集团即将以约3.37亿欧元收购安盛保险集团旗下爱尔兰子公司RedClick。【原文：Zurich Insurance Group AG is set to buy Assicurazioni Generali SpA’s Irish unit RedClick for about €337 million, people familiar with the matter said.】

item.title: 欧洲企业财报季表现参差，银行股超预期
item.description: 欧洲银行第四季度业绩超出预期，得益于交易收入和成本管控，在关税和消费疲软主导的财报季中表现突出。【原文：European banks exceeded expectations in the fourth quarter, buoyed by trading income and cost discipline, standing out in an earnings season marked by tariffs and consumer weakness.】

item.title: 中国近海敏感原油价格飙升至历史新高，战争搅动市场
item.description: 中国近海油轮上囤积的所谓非法原油达到创纪录水平，在中东战争扰乱全球原油供应之际，这为该国私营炼油企业提供了潜在缓冲。【原文：A record volume of so-called illicit crude is being held on tankers off China’s coast, representing a potential buffer for the country’s private refiners as the war in the Middle East disrupts wider flows.】

item.title: Nscale融资20亿美元，桑德伯格与克莱格加入董事会
item.description: 英国人工智能数据中心开发商Nscale已完成20亿美元融资，并新增三位知名商业领袖担任董事，其中包括Meta Platforms Inc.前高管谢丽尔·桑德伯格和尼克·克莱格。【原文：Nscale, a UK developer for artificial intelligence data centers, has raised $2 billion in funding and added a trio of high-profile business leaders as directors, including former Meta Platforms Inc. executives Sheryl Sandberg and Nick Clegg.】

item.title: 内地投资者通过交易通买入创纪录的香港股票
item.description: 中国内地投资者周一通过关键交易通道购入价值372亿港元（48亿美元）的香港股票，创下历史新高，扭转了上周史无前例的抛售态势。【原文：Mainland Chinese investors purchased a record HK$37.2 billion ($4.8 billion) worth of Hong Kong shares through a key trading link on Monday, reversing their unprecedented sale last week.】

item.title: 梅洛尼拟立法应对意大利能源价格飙升
item.description: 意大利媒体《新闻报》等报道称，意大利总理乔尔吉娅·梅洛尼计划加速推进一项新法令，以应对中东战争引发的能源价格飙升问题。【原文：Italy’s Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni plans to fast-track a new law decree to tackle the spike in energy prices resulting from the war in the Middle East, Italian media including La Stampa report.】

item.title: 据称由新加坡政府投资公司支持的Greenko Energies正考虑在印度进行10亿美元的首次公开募股
item.description: 据知情人士透露，印度Greenko Energies Pvt.公司正考虑在孟买进行首次公开募股，筹资额最高可达10亿美元。此前同行业一家公司的上市表现疲软，此次发行或将考验投资者对可再生能源股票的兴趣。【原文：India’s Greenko Energies Pvt. is weighing an initial public offering in Mumbai to raise as much as $1 billion, according to people familiar with the matter, in what could test investor appetite for renewable energy shares after a weak market debut by an industry peer.】

item.title: 油价飙升至每桶100美元或将加剧亚洲财政紧张政府压力
item.description: 随着中东冲突不断加剧，油价已突破每桶100美元大关，亚洲各国政府将不得不扩大财政支出，否则恐将引发通胀冲击。【原文：Asia’s governments will have to stretch their budgets or risk unleashing an inflation shock as the deepening conflict in the Middle East pushes oil prices past $100 a barrel.】
